variants: Kyra Ashworth holds a Vortex Navigator Diploma, showcasing her expertise in the Internet of things. She is a dedicated member of the Echoing Chisel Carvers, where she applies her skills to blend technology with craftsmanship. Mentored by Abby Letsch, Kyra has developed a strong foundation in her field. The Peregrine Advance Guild provides crucial funding for her innovative projects, further fueling her passion for integrating smart devices into everyday practices. Through her work, Kyra aims to enhance the traditional artistry of the craft with modern technological advancements.
